cv.name: Duy Khanh
cv.summary_text: Fullstack Developer with over 4 years of experience building high-performance, user-centric web applications. Strong expertise in ReactJS, Next.js, React Native, and PHP (Laravel). Always focused on building Clean Architecture, optimizing performance, and delivering smooth user experiences.

experience.description: Leading core architecture design and optimizing high-performance systems for enterprise clients. Implementing scalable chat infrastructure and optimizing real-time communication. Proficient in: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, PHP. Working with frameworks: Laravel, ReactJS, React Native, EC-CUBE, Next.js.

projects.name: Tsalad Shopify
projects.description: Complete e-commerce system with shopping cart, online payment, and a robust admin dashboard.
responsibility: Optimizing page load speed and SEO

projects.name: ECCUBE Adwaa
projects.description: A website that allows users to download photos taken at the studio with services such as printing, framing, editing, and album creation. Services include wedding, birthday, and anniversary photos.
responsibility: Developing album management and printing order features

projects.name: Hire Fire
projects.description: An application connecting employers and employees with a matching model similar to Tinder. After matching, both parties can chat directly.

projects.name: Adop Hiroshi App
projects.description: Smart locker unlocking application for apartments. Developed Bluetooth unlocking features via mobile devices.
responsibility: Building access and unlock management APIs

projects.name: VN Coaching
projects.description: Website providing and selling online courses. Users can register accounts and pay for courses by level.

projects.name: Jarmec CTO
projects.description: Application supporting Parkinson's patients with features like medication reminders, prescription management, and tracking medication usage history.
